name: Austin Indoor Golf
address: Inside Pickleball Kingdom, 1900 E Howard Ln I, Pflugerville, TX 78660
about: Austin Indoor Golf offers a climate-controlled facility featuring Full Swing simulators for year-round golf play. The venue provides over 500 world-class courses and supports both hourly rentals and membership options. Members benefit from discounted rates, priority booking, and access to exclusive events. The facility is located inside Pickleball Kingdom, combining golf with other sports activities. The venue hosts private lessons, beginner clinics, and multi-sport games for a diverse range of skill levels and interests.
why_golfers_like_it: World-class Full Swing simulator technology trusted by PGA Tour professionals
Access to over 500 iconic golf courses worldwide including Pebble Beach and TPC Sawgrass
Climate-controlled facility open 7 days a week with flexible booking options
Multi-sport capabilities with 30+ interactive games beyond golf
Membership perks including discounted rates and priority booking

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned, but local catering partners available for events

simulator_hardware.notes: Trusted by PGA Tour professionals like Tiger Woods and Jordan Spieth, featuring 4 HyperClear cameras and ION3 overhead camera

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs or borrow house clubs at no charge. Clean, non-marking shoes are required (athletic or golf shoes are acceptable).

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No on-site food or drink service is mentioned, but local catering partners are available for events. BYOB policies not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can play 18 holes in about an hour as a single or under two hours with 2-3 players.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Austin Indoor Golf welcomes all skill levels including beginners and kids. Family-friendly activities and events are available.
